chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 5363 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.15392/2016 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 10.09.2024 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. Similar is the case for the last many years, during which the respondents have regularly appeared and submitted statements. This petition emanates from year 2016 and was lastly heard on 10.02.2021. Even on that day, the petitioner was not present and the matter was adjourned in the interest of justice. In the circumstances at hand, seemingly the grievance of the petitioner either has been redressed or he has lost interest. The petition thus is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
